name: good_m4_16_autonomy_vs_beneficence_business_ethics
premise: A foreign joint venture partner requested data that would violate export controls if shared as-is. In Business Ethics, the situation tagged internally around autonomy vs beneficence business ethics has converged with local pressure in the Harborline corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A reporter has partial screenshots; if the official narrative shifts later, the organization risks a false-information allegation. Key facts are still arriving from the field; the team is working off stale dashboards and verbal handoffs. A court filing or contractual notice deadline expires at close of business; missing it waives a procedural defense. No option cleanly satisfies both short term and long term; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Refinery Chief Bo Anders
agents.identity: I am Refinery Chief Bo Anders, the accountable executive on this bridge in Business Ethics. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat long term as disposable collateral every time short term spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Union Steward Kim Ruiz
agents.identity: I am Union Steward Kim Ruiz, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Business Ethics. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so short term cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes long term in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will redirect resources to the smallest cohort first where harm is most concentrated, documenting tradeoffs openly—privileging fairness dimensions of long term.
I will optimize for aggregate harm reduction across the whole population immediately—privileging the utilitarian reading of short term even where distribution gets rough.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Refinery Chief Bo Anders must choose under short term versus long term. What does Refinery Chief Bo Anders do?
